name: chatgpt-codex-api-mode-patcher
description: Minimal local patches for ChatGPT/Codex App model visibility and API-key Fast mode.

scripts.check: node --check scripts/chatgpt_app_feature_patcher.mjs && node --check scripts/chatgpt_app_feature_patcher.zh-CN.mjs && node --check scripts/patch_chatgpt_model_picker.mjs && node --check scripts/patch_chatgpt_model_picker.zh-CN.mjs && node --check scripts/record_patch_validation.mjs && node --check scripts/record_patch_validation.zh-CN.mjs && node --check scripts/restore_chatgpt_app.mjs && node --check scripts/restore_chatgpt_app.zh-CN.mjs
